arts.ttl: The eight targets Arsenal have identified as Andrea Berta could genuinely spend more than £300m - journalist
arts.sum: Andrea Berta is ready to spend more money than Arsenal ever have in one window 💰

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes Arsenal Champions League claim ahead of Real Madrid prediction
arts.sum: "I think it depends on who wins out of Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid," he told Sky Sports News when asked how far Arsenal can go in the competition. "I think if Atletico Madrid win, Arsenal have a bit of a chance.

arts.ttl: Champions League Live: Latest score, team news and updates as Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid headlines evening games with Arsenal and Aston Villa also in action
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the Champions League games of Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid, Arsenal vs PSV and Aston Villa vs Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set to learn Champions League fate as Real Madrid sweat over key injury doubt
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been handed a boost as reports suggest Kylian Mbappe is in line to play in Wednesday night's Champions League game despite fitness issues. Ancelotti, it has been said, was hopeful that Mbappe would be fit to start the Round of 16 second-leg while it has since been reported that he has been named in Madrid's matchday squad.

arts.ttl: Odegaard hint, Saka injury update, new Calafiori role - Three things spotted in Arsenal training - football.london
arts.sum: Odegaard, meanwhile, was not wearing one which makes it possible he is rested with club's often organising small-sided games where the starting team plays against those just in the squad. One of Real Madrid or Atletico Madrid will take on Arteta's side in the next round with the Arsenal boss hoping to have key players back and at full fitness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face last-minute Andrea Berta hijack as European giants eye sporting director
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly facing a late challenge from AC Milan in their pursuit of sporting director Andrea Berta, who left Atletico Madrid in January. Berta has been identified as the top choice to replace Edu at the Emirates Stadium, and while it was reported that terms had been agreed with the Italian, there appears to be one last obstacle to navigate.

arts.ttl: Berta Eyeing Arsenal Move to Sign 'World-Class' £330k-a-Week Forward
arts.sum: Arsenal are considering a move for Bayern Munich forward Leroy Sane on a free transfer this summer.

arts.ttl: ‘Maybe’: David Seaman suggests the position Ethan Nwaneri could play for Arsenal when Bukayo Saka returns
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is potentially about to be presented with a serious selection headache at Arsenal. Indeed, Arsenal’s team basically picks itself at the moment. After...

arts.ttl: Ornstein CONFIRMS Arsenal and Liverpool are DESPERATE to sign Isak
arts.sum: David Ornstein has confirmed that Alexander Isak sits at the top of the summer shortlists of Arsenal and Liverpool . Transfer insider David Ornstein of The Athletic has now confirmed that Isak tops the summer shopping lists of Arsenal and Liverpool, but also made it clear that a move seems unlikely as things stand.

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available to face PSV Eindhoven as key player returns from injury
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, Gabriel Jesus, Kai Havertz and Takehiro Tomiyasu all remain sidelined with injuries and will not be in the matchday squad to take on PSV at the Emirates. Arsenal will be looking to book a place in the quarter-final of the Champions League when they face PSV Eindhoven.
